name: 1997-commerce-exchange-pvp-250db8
title: Commerce eXchange Answers The 'Show Me The Internet Money!' Challenge
description: Aberdeen Group Product Viewpoint (Volume 10, Number 2, March 14, 1997) evaluating InterWorld Technology Ventures' Commerce eXchange 2.0 enterprise internet commerce platform, covering the $520M internet goods market, transaction engine architecture, CORBA/DCOM neutrality via Oasis abstraction layer, B2B/B2C integration, and reference customers.

sources.title: Aberdeen Group Product Viewpoint Vol.10 No.2, March 14, 1997
